query: Have I received any emails in the last 7 days? List sender and subject.
reasoning: The query requires checking email data for the last 7 days, which can be done directly using the graph agent to fetch the necessary information.

steps.task: Retrieve all emails received in the last 7 days, including the sender and subject for each email.

synthesis: Compile the results to present the list of senders and subjects of the emails received in the last 7 days.
